ui.app.title: Galgame Play Assistant
ui.app.subtitle: Let N.E.K.O accompany your galgame session
ui.diag.waiting_body: After status loads, this panel shows whether dialogue can be recognized and what to do next.
ui.current_line.hint: After text is recognized, this area separates newly observed candidate lines from confirmed lines.
ui.ocr.pipeline.title: Window, capture, recognition, and line confirmation
ui.ocr.window.title: OCR Target Window
ui.ocr.window.no_locked: No locked window. Use the button below to choose one.
ui.settings.title: Plugin Settings
ui.settings.control.title: Runtime Control
ui.settings.control.desc: Agent pause/resume, reader mode, and trigger mode
ui.settings.reader_auto: Auto (memory text first, OCR takes over after it stops)
ui.settings.llm_vision_note: Send game screenshots to the LLM when OCR confidence is low. This increases token usage.
ui.settings.fast_loop_note: Continuously poll within the recognition interval to reduce latency.
ui.settings.vision_max_note: Sending images at low confidence increases token cost and includes the game screen.
ui.game.recognition_desc: Game target, OCR target window, and capture calibration
ui.game.auto_detail: The plugin prioritizes the currently available target.
ui.memory.target_desc: Manually lock the game process when auto detection fails. After restart, it rebinds by exe path and process name.
ui.memory.waiting_candidates: Waiting for Memory Reader process candidates.
ui.memory.no_locked: No locked Memory Reader process. Use the button below to choose one.
ui.install.title: Dependency Installation
ui.install.summary: OCR recognition dependencies and memory reader dependencies are managed separately
ui.install.ocr_desc: RapidOCR is the primary recognition backend, DXcam provides stable capture, and Tesseract is a compatibility fallback.
ui.install.memory_desc: Textractor is only used for the memory reader fallback path and does not affect OCR capture recognition.
ui.install.rapidocr.lang.label: Recognition language
ui.install.tesseract.queued: Background installation task created. It will download Tesseract and language packs over HTTPS and stream progress via SSE.
ui.install.textractor.queued: Background installation task created. It will download Textractor over HTTPS and stream progress via SSE.
ui.flash.plugin_not_started: Plugin not started. Please click "Start" on the plugin management page.
ui.flash.loaded_status: Plugin status loaded. Window list, dependency status, and suggestions are updating in the background.
ui.dashboard.status_desc: Connection, data source, and OCR runtime
ui.dashboard.snapshot_desc: Current line, choices, and menu state
ui.dashboard.pushes_desc: Messages queued for the N.E.K.O side
ui.dashboard.history_desc: Recent lines, choices, and low-level events
ui.agent.empty_status: Agent is tidying its notes and waiting for the first status refresh.
ui.agent.empty_suggest: No suggestions yet. They will appear once choices show up on screen.
ui.reader_mode.auto: Auto (memory text first, OCR takes over after it stops)
ui.screen_templates.title: Screen Templates
ui.screen_templates.desc: Override generic screen classification by process, window title, or keyword; AiHong-specific logic still takes priority.
ui.screen_templates.region_hint: Load the latest OCR screen-sensing screenshot, then drag to select a region.
ui.capture_profile.title: OCR Screenshot Calibration
ui.capture_profile.desc: Save window crop ratios by process name. For regular games, saving the general region is enough; AiHong can save dialogue and menu regions separately to avoid overwriting its two-stage OCR ranges.
ui.capture_profile.auto_apply: Allow future recommendations to apply automatically
ui.capture_profile.runtime_wait: Waiting for OCR target process information.
ui.stage.title: Title/Main Menu
ui.install.rapidocr.body: Detection results for the plugin-isolated RapidOCR runtime will appear here.
ui.install.dxcam.body: DXcam captures the foreground game screen more reliably and reduces interference from the plugin page or stale frames.
ui.install.tesseract.body: Compatibility fallback detection for local Tesseract and the `chi_sim+jpn+eng` language packs will appear here.
ui.install.textractor.body: Textractor remains as an experimental fallback for Memory Reader and is no longer the primary first-run path.
ui.field.speaker: Speaker
ui.install.rapidocr.force_title: Force OCR Reader to use RapidOCR
ui.install.ocr_auto.title: Auto-select the OCR backend with RapidOCR first and Tesseract as fallback
ui.install.rapidocr.unsupported_title: Automatic RapidOCR installation is not supported on this platform
ui.install.rapidocr.unsupported_body: The RapidOCR primary backend currently installs only on Windows local runtimes.
ui.install.rapidocr.active_title: RapidOCR has taken over the current OCR Reader
ui.install.rapidocr.ready_title: RapidOCR is ready and waiting to serve as the primary OCR backend
ui.install.rapidocr.fallback_body: RapidOCR is installed, but this frame fell back to Tesseract. Reason
ui.install.rapidocr.ready_body: RapidOCR has finished installing. When no SDK or valid memory text is available, it will take priority over Tesseract as the OCR Reader backend.
ui.install.rapidocr.broken_title: RapidOCR runtime is broken or failed to import
ui.install.rapidocr.broken_body: Re-run the one-click install. The installer will place a fresh isolated runtime and run a blank-image inference self-check afterward.
ui.install.rapidocr.not_ready_body: RapidOCR is now the internal primary backend for OCR Reader. After install, it will take priority over Tesseract, which remains only as a compatibility fallback.
ui.install.task_failed_retry: The background install task failed. You can click the button again to retry.
ui.install.task_done_refreshing: Task complete — waiting for plugin status refresh.
ui.flash.invalid_ocr_interval: OCR/DXcam interval must be between 0.5 and 10 seconds.
ui.flash.invalid_vision_max: Vision max side must be between 64 and 2048.
ui.flash.resume_focus_pause: The current pause is caused by window focus loss. Return to the game window and the Agent will continue automatically; Resume only clears manual standby.
ui.flash.resume_read_only_mode: Current companion/silent mode will not click automatically. Switch to Auto Advance when automatic progress is needed.
ui.flash.no_manual_standby: The Agent is not in manual standby.
ui.flash.agent_prompt_required: Enter text to send to the Agent
ui.install.capture_auto.title: Default chain: DXcam first, MSS → PyAutoGUI as fallbacks (PrintWindow only as explicit selection or Smart background)
ui.install.smart.title: Prefer DXcam in foreground and only try PrintWindow in background to avoid reading occluded visible pixels
ui.install.mss.title: Use the cross-platform MSS screenshot backend; the game window must be visible
ui.install.printwindow.title: Use Win32 PrintWindow fallback; DirectX/Unity games may return stale frames
ui.install.dxcam.force_title: Force the capture backend to use DXcam
ui.install.dxcam.selected_waiting: DXcam selected, waiting for the next OCR capture to confirm
ui.install.dxcam.unsupported_title: Automatic DXcam installation is not supported on this platform
ui.install.dxcam.unsupported_body: The DXcam capture backend is only for Windows desktop capture; this platform will continue using compatible capture options.
ui.install.dxcam.active_title: DXcam is working as the capture backend
ui.install.dxcam.ready_title: DXcam is installed and waiting for OCR Reader to use it automatically
ui.install.dxcam.active_body: The current capture backend uses DXcam. It still requires the game window to be foreground-visible and does not bypass or capture in the background.
ui.install.dxcam.ready_body_prefix: DXcam is installed. Current capture backend
ui.install.dxcam.not_ready_body: After installing DXcam, the auto capture backend will prefer GPU Desktop Duplication for foreground game capture, reducing plugin-page occlusion and stale PrintWindow frames.
ui.install.tesseract.force_title: Force OCR Reader to use Tesseract
ui.install.tesseract.install_first_title: Install Tesseract and required language packs first
ui.install.tesseract.unsupported_title: Automatic Tesseract installation is not supported on this platform
ui.install.tesseract.unsupported_body: Tesseract is kept only as an OCR Reader compatibility fallback, and local automatic installation is only available on Windows.
ui.install.tesseract.active_title: Tesseract is working as the compatibility fallback
ui.install.tesseract.ready_title: Tesseract is ready and waiting for fallback use
ui.install.tesseract.active_body_prefix: Current OCR Reader uses Tesseract. Reason
ui.install.tesseract.ready_body: Local Tesseract and the default chi_sim+jpn+eng language packs are ready. It will take over OCR when RapidOCR is missing, broken, or fails at runtime.
ui.install.tesseract.missing_languages_t: Tesseract detected, but fallback language packs are incomplete
ui.install.tesseract.missing_languages_b: The installer will add the default chi_sim+jpn+eng language files required for compatibility fallback.
ui.install.tesseract.not_ready_title: Tesseract not detected; compatibility fallback is not ready
ui.install.tesseract.not_ready_body: This does not prevent RapidOCR from working as the primary backend, but local Tesseract fallback will not be available if RapidOCR is missing or fails.
ui.install.tesseract.installing_title: Tesseract is installing in the background
ui.install.tesseract.installing_body: The installer and language packs download over HTTPS, and this page receives live progress through SSE. The latest install state will be restored even after refresh.
ui.install.tesseract.failed_title: Tesseract installation failed and can be retried
ui.install.tesseract.completed_refresh_t: Tesseract installation completed, refreshing OCR status
ui.install.textractor.unsupported_title: Textractor automatic installation is not needed on this platform
ui.install.textractor.unsupported_body: The Textractor memory-reading fallback is only enabled on Windows, and its priority is now below OCR Reader.
ui.install.textractor.ready_blocked_titl: Textractor is installed and waiting for manual/experimental Memory Reader takeover
ui.install.textractor.ready_title: Textractor is ready, but only as an experimental fallback
ui.install.textractor.ready_blocked_body: TextractorCLI.exe is detected. It remains in the pipeline, but its priority is fixed below OCR Reader and it is no longer the first-run acceptance path.
ui.install.textractor.missing_blocked_ti: Textractor not detected; experimental Memory Reader fallback is unavailable
ui.install.textractor.missing_blocked_bo: If you still want to try Memory Reader later, you can install Textractor here; the official primary fallback remains OCR Reader.
ui.install.textractor.missing_body: Textractor only affects the experimental Memory Reader path and does not affect the official Bridge SDK > OCR Reader runtime order.
ui.install.textractor.installing_title: Textractor is installing in the background
ui.install.textractor.installing_body: The download runs over HTTPS, and this page receives live progress through SSE. Textractor only strengthens the experimental Memory Reader path after completion.
ui.install.textractor.failed_title: Textractor installation failed and can be retried
ui.install.textractor.completed_refresh_: Textractor installation completed, refreshing plugin status
ui.memory.auto_hint: Memory Reader prioritizes RenPy / Unity / KiriKiri detection. If auto detection fails, select a process manually.
ui.memory.no_locked_target: No Memory Reader target process has been confirmed. If auto detection fails, click “Select Process” to lock one manually.
ui.ocr.window.auto_hint: The plugin first tries the current foreground or bound game window. If it cannot identify one confidently, select the game window manually.
ui.ocr.window.capture_dxcam_failed: DXcam capture failed and switched to compatible capture automatically
ui.ocr.window.capture_dxcam_unavailable: DXcam is not installed, so compatible capture is in use. Installing dxcam can reduce occlusion and stale-frame issues.
ui.ocr.window.capture_stale: The capture source is not updating. Return to the game window or switch the DXcam capture backend.
ui.ocr.window.no_locked_target: No OCR target window has been confirmed. The plugin first tries the foreground or bound game window; if no text is recognized, click “Select OCR Window” to lock one manually.
ui.ocr_profile.auto_recalibrate.unsuppor: The current platform is not Windows
ui.ocr_profile.auto_recalibrate.capture_: The current capture backend is unavailable
ui.ocr_profile.auto_recalibrate.no_targe: No OCR target window is attached
ui.ocr_profile.aihong_stage_hint: The Lamenting Geese supports separate dialogue/menu saves
ui.ocr_profile.no_target_aihong_hint: No OCR target process is attached yet. You can manually enter TheLamentingGeese.exe and pre-save separate dialogue/menu capture regions. Auto recalibration requires an attached real game window first.
ui.ocr_profile.no_target_hint: No OCR target process is attached yet. You can manually enter process_name and pre-save screenshot calibration. Auto recalibration requires an attached real game window first.
ui.ocr_profile.auto_recalibrate.title: Auto-recalibrate the dialogue region using the currently attached window
ui.ocr_profile.apply_recommended.manual_: A manual profile already exists, so the recommendation will not overwrite it automatically. You can save calibration manually.
ui.ocr_profile.apply_recommended.blocked: No recommended profile is available to apply
ui.ocr_profile.apply_recommended.title: Apply the current recommended profile and keep an automatic rollback point
ui.ocr_profile.rollback.title: Roll back the most recent recommended profile application
ui.ocr_profile.rollback.blocked_title: No recommended profile is pending rollback
ui.suggest.meta: input source={inputSource} | degraded={degraded} | semantic granularity={semantic} | fallback used={fallback}
ui.suggest.silent_diagnostic: Silent mode: suggestions are not generated automatically.
ui.suggest.companion_diagnostic: Companion mode: choice suggestions are not generated automatically.
ui.suggest.pending: Choice suggestions are refreshing in the background...
ui.suggest.initial_pending: Waiting for the first status refresh; choice suggestions will update in the background.
ui.flash.ocr_recommended_profile_rolled_: Recommended OCR screenshot calibration rolled back
ui.flash.memory_process_refresh_failed: Memory Reader process list refresh failed. Try again later.
ui.flash.clearing_memory_process_lock: Clearing manual Memory Reader process lock...
ui.flash.memory_process_auto_restored: Memory Reader automatic process detection restored
ui.flash.ocr_window_refresh_failed: OCR window list refresh failed. Try again later.
ui.flash.ocr_window_locked: Locked OCR recognition window: {target}. Recognition status is refreshing in the background.
ui.flash.ocr_window_cleared: OCR target window cleared. The plugin will try automatic detection again; select one manually if recognition still fails.
ui.flash.status_refreshed_windows_failed: Status refreshed; window list refresh failed. Try again later.
ui.flash.status_refresh_failed: Status refresh failed. Try again later.
ui.flash.line_details_revealed: Moved to current line recognition details.
ui.flash.capture_backend_settings_reveal: Moved to capture backend settings. You can switch DXcam, MSS, PyAutoGUI, or PrintWindow.
ui.flash.focus_game_window: Return to the game window. After it is foreground again, recognition will continue on the next refresh.
ui.flash.action_unavailable: This action is not available yet.
ui.flash.status_windows_refreshed_insigh: Status and window list refreshed; choice suggestions are updating in the background.
ui.diag.plugin_not_started.title: Plugin not started
ui.diag.plugin_not_started.body: Click "Start" on the plugin management page. Data will refresh automatically after startup.
ui.diag.plugin_error.title: Plugin runtime error
ui.diag.plugin_error.body: {error}. Refresh status first; if it still happens, check debug details.
ui.diag.window_minimized.title: Game window is minimized
ui.diag.window_minimized.body: A game was detected, but the window is minimized and OCR cannot capture it. Restore the game window to continue.
ui.diag.capture_failed.title: Capture or text recognition failed
ui.diag.capture_failed.default_error: The capture or recognition backend returned an error, so new lines will not update.
ui.diag.capture_failed.interval_body: {error} OCR is currently reading in timed background mode. Confirm the window is visible and not minimized; if it still fails, switch capture backend or select the OCR window again.
ui.diag.stale_capture.title: Capture image is not updating
ui.diag.stale_capture.interval_body: The capture image is not updating during timed background OCR. Confirm the game window is visible and not minimized; if it still stays on an old frame, switch capture backend or select the OCR window again.
ui.diag.stale_capture.body: The current capture source may be stuck on an old frame. Return to the game window or switch capture backend and try again.
ui.diag.waiting_advance.title: OCR is waiting for game advance
ui.diag.waiting_advance.body: Recognition after dialogue click is enabled and the previous pass has completed. OCR will capture again after a click, mouse wheel down, or advance key.
ui.diag.memory_priority.title: Memory Reader is providing text first
ui.diag.memory_priority.body: Auto mode detected recent Memory Reader text, so OCR polling is paused for now.
ui.diag.ocr_tick_blocked.title: OCR polling has not run yet
ui.diag.non_dialogue.title: OCR classified the screen as non-dialogue
ui.diag.non_dialogue.body: Capture and recognition ran, but screen classification says the current screen should not write dialogue.
ui.diag.no_new_line.title: OCR ran but found no new line
ui.diag.no_window.title: No recognizable game window found
ui.diag.no_window.body: The game may not be running, may be minimized, or the current window may not be the game. Confirm the game window is visible and refresh.
ui.diag.manual_window.title: Manual game window selection is required
ui.diag.manual_window.body: Automatic detection is not confident enough. Selecting manually once prevents recognizing the plugin page or another window.
ui.diag.observed_new.title: New text was observed
ui.diag.observed_new.body: Text recognition has seen a candidate line and is confirming whether it is the same line.
ui.diag.not_foreground.title: Game is not foreground
ui.diag.not_foreground.body: Auto advance is paused. It will continue after returning to the game window; companion information still refreshes.
ui.diag.read_only.title: Current mode is companion
ui.diag.read_only.body: Lines and suggestions are shown, but the plugin will not click automatically. Switch mode when auto advance is needed.
ui.diag.recognizing.title: Recognizing lines
ui.diag.recognizing.body_with_target: Current target: {target}. A line has been read and the page will keep refreshing.
ui.diag.recognizing.body: A line has been read and the page will keep refreshing.
ui.diag.waiting_game.title: Waiting for game status
ui.diag.waiting_game.body: There is not enough information to diagnose the current blocker. Open the game first or refresh the window list.
ui.first_run.section_subtitle: Follow these steps to connect the recognition flow.
ui.first_run.start_game.title: Start or restore the game
ui.first_run.start_game.pending: Open the game and stop on a screen with text.
ui.first_run.refresh_window.title: Refresh windows
ui.first_run.refresh_window.pending: Return to the plugin page and click "Refresh Windows".
ui.first_run.select_window.title: Select game window
ui.first_run.select_window.pending: If none was selected automatically, choose the game window manually.
ui.first_run.recognize.title: Start recognition
ui.first_run.recognize.pending: Start automatic recognition, or advance to the next line in the game.
ui.first_run.install_ocr.title: OCR Models
ui.first_run.install_ocr.done: OCR engine and selected models are ready.
ui.first_run.install_ocr.pending: RapidOCR is unavailable. Use the packaged build, or from source run `uv sync --group galgame` and restart.
ui.first_run.install_capture.title: Install Capture Tool
ui.first_run.install_capture.pending: Go to "Dependencies" panel and install DXcam.
ui.first_run.calibrate.title: Calibrate Capture Area
ui.first_run.calibrate.pending: Open "Advanced Settings" and set crop ratios in OCR Capture Calibration.
ui.first_run.skip_confirm: Skip the setup guide? You can re-open it later in Advanced Settings.
ui.error.template_json_must_be_array: Template JSON must be an array.
ui.error.no_template_draft_returned: The plugin did not return a usable template draft.
ui.flash.screen_template_draft_created: Screen template draft created. Edit it before saving.
ui.screen_templates.drag_region_hint: Drag on the screenshot to select a region.
ui.error.no_ocr_snapshot: No screenshot is available. Enable Vision first and wait for OCR to finish one full-screen awareness pass.
ui.screen_templates.snapshot_loaded_hint: Screenshot loaded. Drag to select a region.
ui.flash.select_region_first: Select a region on the screenshot first.
ui.flash.region_template_draft_created: Template draft generated from the selected region.
ui.flash.region_applied_to_profile: Selected region applied to the OCR screenshot calibration form. Confirm and save when ready.
ui.current_line.confirming_repeat_hint: Confirming whether this is the same line; seen {count} times in a row.
ui.current_line.confirming_hint: Confirming whether this is the same line.
ui.current_line.confirmed_hint: This line has entered the official context; future suggestions will update based on it.
ui.current_line.filtering_hint: Text recognition has a result, but it has not been written as an official line yet.
ui.pipeline.window.waiting_body: Waiting for the target window to become recognizable.
ui.pipeline.window.waiting_confirm_body: The window stage is waiting for confirmation.
ui.pipeline.capture.waiting_body: The capture stage is waiting for window confirmation.
ui.pipeline.stage_error_body: The stage has an error; use Runtime Diagnosis for actions.
ui.pipeline.ocr.waiting_body: The recognition stage is waiting for capture input.
ui.pipeline.ocr.tick_blocked_title: OCR polling has not run yet
ui.pipeline.ocr.tick_waiting_body: The polling stage is waiting for conditions.
ui.pipeline.ocr.error_body: The recognition stage has an error; use Runtime Diagnosis for actions.
ui.pipeline.ocr.no_write_body: Recognition ran but did not write a new line.
ui.pipeline.ocr.executed_no_write_body: Recognition ran but did not write a new line.
ui.pipeline.observed.confirming_body: The candidate line is waiting for stable confirmation.
ui.pipeline.observed.waiting_text_body: The candidate stage is waiting for valid text.
ui.pipeline.stable.waiting_body: The confirmation stage is waiting for stability.
ui.pipeline.stable.waiting_candidate_bod: The confirmation stage is waiting for a candidate line.
ui.pipeline.agent.waiting_body: The Agent decides whether to auto advance based on the mode.
ui.pipeline.agent.error_body: The Agent returned an error status.
ui.pipeline.agent.not_foreground_body: Auto advance is paused. Return to the game to continue.
ui.pipeline.agent.safety_pause_body: The current screen is not suitable for auto advance.
ui.pipeline.agent.read_only_body: Lines and suggestions are shown, but automatic clicks are disabled.
ui.install.rapidocr.missing_models_title: Selected language models not downloaded ({count} files, ~{size} MB)
ui.agent.notice.waiting_actionable: Auto advance is enabled and waiting for the game session, OCR line, or target window to become actionable.
ui.agent.notice.companion_no_advance: The game window is foreground, but companion mode will not auto advance. Switch to Auto Advance when needed.
ui.agent.notice.auto_advance_running: The game window is foreground. The Agent will continue in Auto Advance mode, and OCR will keep refreshing in the background.
ui.agent.notice.running: The Agent is running in the current mode. OCR will keep refreshing in the background.
ui.agent.notice.default: Agent status updates automatically with the game window, OCR, and mode settings.
ui.ocr.missing_line.capture_target_abnor: OCR capture region or window target may be abnormal
ui.ocr.missing_line.no_available_line: OCR has not read an available line yet
ui.install.plugin_unavailable_body: Plugin runtime status cannot be read right now. Start or reload galgame_plugin first; installation and runtime status will appear here after startup.
ui.error.install_state_read_failed: Failed to read {label} install status: HTTP {status}
ui.error.latest_install_state_read_faile: Failed to read latest {label} install status: HTTP {status}
ui.error.install_task_create_failed: Failed to create {label} install task: HTTP {status}
ui.reason.stable.waiting_for_repeat: New text was observed; confirming whether it is the same line
ui.reason.stable.duplicate_stable_text: This line has already been displayed
ui.reason.stable.duplicate_raw_text: The recognition result matches the previous pass, so it will not be written again
ui.reason.stable.duplicate_observed_text: The candidate line matches the previous pass and is waiting for a change
ui.reason.stable.duplicate_candidate_tex: The candidate line matches the previous pass and is waiting for a change
ui.reason.stable.empty_text: Text recognition has not read valid text yet
ui.reason.stable.no_text: Text recognition has not read valid text yet
ui.reason.stable.no_valid_text: Text recognition has not read valid text yet
ui.reason.stable.low_confidence: Text recognition confidence is low, so the line is not written yet
ui.reason.stable.overlay_text: The recognition result looks like system UI text, so it is not written yet
ui.reason.stable.game_overlay_text: The recognition result looks like a game menu or system UI, so it is not written yet
ui.reason.stable.waiting_for_change: Screen text has not changed; waiting for a new line
ui.reason.stable.waiting_for_new_text: Waiting for a new line to appear
ui.reason.stable.capture_failed: Capture or recognition failed, so the line cannot be confirmed yet
ui.reason.tick.ocr_reader_unavailable: OCR Reader is not available yet
ui.reason.tick.ocr_reader_not_allowed: The current reader mode does not allow OCR
ui.reason.tick.memory_reader_recent_text: Memory Reader has recent text, so OCR is not polled yet
ui.reason.tick.memory_reader_default_una: The default Memory Reader target is not available yet, so OCR was not actively selected
ui.reason.tick.waiting_pending_advance_d: Waiting for the delayed capture window after advance
ui.reason.tick.trigger_mode_after_advanc: Recognize-after-click mode is waiting for game advance
Recognize-after-click mode is waiting for refresh conditions
ui.reason.tick.plugin_config_missing: Plugin configuration is not ready yet
ui.reason.tick.ocr_reader_manager_missin: OCR Reader manager is not ready yet
ui.reason.tick.ocr_fast_loop_started: OCR Fast Loop has taken over this capture pass
ui.reason.tick.ocr_tick_lock_busy: The previous OCR tick is still running
ui.reason.tick.tick_gate_timeout: Advance-capture gate timed out and was cleared
ui.reason.tick.trigger_mode_not_after_ad: Current trigger mode is not recognize-after-click
ui.reason.tick.target_missing: Target game window does not exist
ui.reason.tick.target_not_visible: Target game window is not visible
ui.reason.tick.target_not_foreground: Target game window is not foreground
ui.reason.emit.no_dialogue_text: No dialogue text can be written
ui.game.binding.fixed_detail: {detail}. After clicking “Restore Auto”, the plugin will select from currently available targets again.
ui.game.binding.auto_detail: The plugin prioritizes the currently available target. To fix a target, click a candidate below.
ui.game.binding.no_games: No bindable game found. Confirm Bridge/OCR/Memory Reader is connected to a game window.
ui.game.binding.auto_short_detail: The plugin prioritizes the currently available target
ui.memory.detail.manual_target_rebound: Rebound by exe path and process name
ui.memory.detail.manual_target_unavailab: Manual process is unavailable; select again
ui.memory.detail.manual_pid_unimplemente: auto_detect=false but no manual target is locked yet
ui.memory.detail.detected_kirikiri_commo: Detected KiriKiri from common xp3 resources
ui.memory.detail.detected_kirikiri_prese: Detected KiriKiri from the Senren Banka built-in signature
ui.ocr.window.reason.excluded_helper_win: Excluded system or host helper window
ui.ocr.window.reason.excluded_small_or_h: Excluded a too-small or unavailable window
ui.ocr.window.reason.excluded_minimized_: Game window is minimized; OCR cannot capture it. Restore the window.
ui.ocr.window.detail.manual_target_unava: Manual window is unavailable; lock a window again
ui.ocr.window.detail.waiting_for_manual_: Auto detection failed; manually lock the OCR target window
ui.ocr.window.detail.auto_detect_needs_m: No trusted auto target found; select the game window manually
ui.ocr.window.detail.foreground_window_n: Current foreground window does not look like a game; select the game window manually
ui.ocr.window.detail.no_eligible_window: No available game window right now
ui.ocr.window.detail.memory_reader_windo: Game window is minimized; OCR cannot capture it. Restore the window.
ui.ocr.window.detail.memory_reader_minim: Window was marked minimized but is actually foreground, so it was restored automatically
ui.ocr.window.detail.memory_reader_pid: Reusing the PID matched by Memory Reader first
ui.ocr.window.detail.memory_reader_proce: Reusing the process matched by Memory Reader first
ui.ocr.window.detail.manual_target_overr: Memory Reader target differs from the OCR manual target, so Memory Reader is preferred
OCR manual target is stale; switched back to current game by Memory Reader PID
OCR manual target is stale; switched back to current game by Memory Reader process
Memory Reader switched to another game, so OCR will not keep reading the old window
ui.ocr.window.detail.memory_reader_targe: Memory Reader target window is unavailable; OCR is paused to avoid reading the wrong window
ui.ocr.window.detail.foreground_window: Prefer the current foreground candidate window
ui.first_run.install_ocr.pending_tessera: Go to "Dependencies" panel and install Tesseract.
ui.install.rapidocr.bundled_hint: RapidOCR is now bundled with the main program. If you're running the packaged build, please reinstall it; if you're running from source, run `uv sync --group galgame` and restart.
ui.install.rapidocr.unavailable_title: RapidOCR unavailable — use the packaged build, or run `uv sync --group galgame` from source
ui.install.dxcam.bundled_hint: DXcam is now bundled with the main program (Windows only). If you're running the packaged build, please reinstall it; if from source, run `uv sync --group galgame` and restart. The capture chain falls back to MSS / PyAutoGUI automatically.
ui.install.dxcam.unavailable_title: DXcam unavailable — Windows only, requires packaged build or `uv sync --group galgame`
ui.install.pyautogui.title: Use the cross-platform PyAutoGUI screenshot backend (slower on macOS/Linux)
ui.flash.rapidocr_hint_revealed: Scrolled to the RapidOCR status banner. Follow the on-banner steps (reinstall packaged build / uv sync --group galgame).
ui.flash.dxcam_hint_revealed: Scrolled to the DXcam status banner. Follow the on-banner steps (reinstall packaged build / uv sync --group galgame).
ui.install.rapidocr.missing_models_kicke: OCR Primary Backend - Models Not Downloaded
ui.install.rapidocr.missing_models_title: RapidOCR is ready, but the selected language models haven't been downloaded
ui.install.rapidocr.missing_models_body: Current selection lang_type={lang} + ocr_version={version} requires the following model files in the local cache ({count} files, ~{size} MB total). Click the button below to download them; downloads come from RapidAI's ModelScope mirror.
ui.install.rapidocr.missing_models_manua: Current selection lang_type={lang} + ocr_version={version} requires the following model files in the local cache ({count} files, ~{size} MB total). Automatic download is unavailable right now. Download the missing files manually from {source} into {dir}, then click "Refresh Status".
ui.install.rapidocr.download_models.queu: Model download task created. Files will be fetched from ModelScope and progress streamed via SSE.
ui.install.rapidocr.download_failure_pro:
Last download failed: {error}
Mainland China networks may need a proxy. You can also manually download the missing files from {source} into {dir}, then click "Refresh Status".
ui.first_run.install_ocr.pending_models: The selected language models ({lang} + {version}) are not downloaded. Click "Download Models Now" to fetch them from ModelScope (~{size} MB).
ui.first_run.install_ocr.pending_models_: The selected language models ({lang} + {version}) are not downloaded. Auto-download is not available in this environment — follow the RapidOCR banner instructions to place the models manually, then refresh status.
